message:
fix(abi): clippy fixes + reclassify 14 native GCT symbols as Implemented

- Fix 5 clippy errors in glibc_internal_abi.rs (range contains, iterator
  indexing, ascii checks) and 2 compile errors (missing parens around
  unsafe blocks)
- Reclassify 14 symbols from GlibcCallThrough to Implemented that are
  already natively implemented (no dlsym delegation): __mktemp,
  __twalk_r, __ns_name_* (7), __file_change_detection_* (3),
  __file_is_unchanged, __shm_get_name
- Update summary counts: Implemented 3379→3393, GCT 193→179
- Fix stale counts.Implemented (2504→3393)
- Run cargo fmt across glibc_internal_abi.rs, math_abi.rs, e2e_suite_test.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
